body.purpose: Default text for all UI content, parameter values, labels.

label.purpose: Channel abbreviations, badges, dense parameter names.

mono.purpose: Canvas frequency/dB grid labels, meter values.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default 150ms ease for hover/focus/active state changes.

motion.name: press-feedback
motion.purpose: Active/press state, slightly faster ease-in for tactile response.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Surface white on dark card surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.922 0.008 270); color: oklch(0.205 0.006 270); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border: 1px solid oklch(0.556 0.01 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.556 0.01 270 / 50%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with border, fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 10%); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0.004 270); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.269 0.008 270); color: oklch(0.985 0.004 270); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.556 0.01 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.556 0.01 270 / 50%); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Raised work surface for grouped controls. No shadow, tonal layer + ghost border.
components.html:
Master EQ

Content here
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: oklch(0.205 0.006 270); color: oklch(0.985 0.004 270); padding: 1rem 0; box-shadow: none; outline: 1px solid oklch(0.985 0.004 270 / 10%); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-card-header { padding: 0 1rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 1rem; }

components.name: Slider
components.description: Continuous value input for dB, frequency, gain. Full-round track with filled indicator.
components.css: .ds-slider { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-slider-track { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.269 0.008 270); overflow: hidden; } .ds-slider-fill { height: 100%; background: oklch(0.922 0.008 270); border-radius: 9999px; transition: none; } .ds-slider-thumb { position: absolute; width: 0.75rem; height: 0.75rem; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid oklch(0.556 0.01 270); transform: translateX(-50%); cursor: grab; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-slider-thumb:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.556 0.01 270 / 50%); }

components.name: Switch Toggle
components.description: Binary toggle for bypass, mute. Pill shape with sliding thumb.
components.css: .ds-switch { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: 32px; height: 18.4px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; background: oklch(1 0 0 / 15%); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); padding: 0; } .ds-switch-checked { background: oklch(0.922 0.008 270); } .ds-switch-thumb { position: absolute; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); left: 1px; } .ds-switch-checked .ds-switch-thumb { transform: translateX(14px); background: oklch(0.205 0.006 270); } .ds-switch:focus-visible { border: 1px solid oklch(0.556 0.01 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.556 0.01 270 / 50%); }

components.name: Number Input
components.description: Compact inline numeric input for EQ parameters in table cells.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 1.75rem; padding: 0 0.25rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: calc(0.625rem * 0.8); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0.004 270); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.556 0.01 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.556 0.01 270 / 50%); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact status pill for connection type, platform info.
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 10%); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0.004 270); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Preset Button
components.description: Preset slot selector in a 2-column grid. Active state uses primary accent background tint.
components.css: .ds-preset { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 10%); border-radius: calc(0.625rem * 0.6); background: transparent; color: oklch(0.985 0.004 270); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-preset:hover { border-color: oklch(0.922 0.008 270 / 50%); } .ds-preset-active { border-color: oklch(0.922 0.008 270); background: oklch(0.922 0.008 270 / 10%); color: oklch(0.922 0.008 270); }

narrative.overview:
A focused workspace where every element is a precision instrument. Like an electronics lab bench under focused task lighting, the DSPi control panel surfaces only what matters: the signal path, the parameters, the measurements. No decorative UI chrome, no ambient decoration, no visual noise.

The system is built on tonal layering, not shadow elevation. Surfaces are distinguished by slight lightness differences within a narrow range (oklch L 0.08 to 0.27). Interaction feedback is immediate and tactile: state changes at 150ms, parameter updates reflected in real time on the EQ curve. Typography is a single sans family (Geist Variable) used across all roles, differentiated by weight and size alone. The only saturated color on screen is the EQ response curve and meter gradient: a cool cyan that reads clearly against the dark canvas without competing for attention.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, tonally layered surfaces with no shadow elevation
Single accent (cool cyan, ~oklch 0.78 0.16 210) reserved for signal visualization only
Geist Variable as the sole typeface, all roles
Canvas elements (EQ curve, meters) are the visual anchors, not UI chrome
Tight spacing, dense information, minimal decorative whitespace

rules.name: The Signal Path Rule
rules.body: Saturated chroma (C > 0.05 in OKLCH) is reserved for canvas elements that represent audio signal: the EQ curve, meter bars, and band markers. All UI chrome (buttons, cards, borders, text) stays within the achromatic neutral band (C < 0.01). If a saturated color appears outside a canvas, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Tonal Stack Rule
rules.body: Surfaces convey depth through lightness differences, never shadows. The stack from bottom to top: Background (L 0.145), Card (L 0.205), Muted/Secondary (L 0.269). Adjacent layers differ by L ~0.06. No box-shadow on any UI element.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: One typeface, Geist Variable, for all UI text. No display fonts, no serif accents, no secondary sans. Weight and size create hierarchy; font-family switches would be noise.

rules.name: The No Shadow Rule
rules.body: No element on screen uses box-shadow. If depth is ambiguous, increase the lightness gap between adjacent surfaces or add a ghost border at 10% foreground opacity.

dos: Do use tonal layering (lightness differences of L 0.06 between adjacent surfaces) for depth, never shadows.
Do reserve the cool cyan accent (oklch 0.78 0.16 210) exclusively for signal path visualization: the EQ curve, curve fill, and active-state canvas elements.
Do keep all UI chrome within the achromatic neutral band (chroma < 0.01 in OKLCH).
Do use Geist Variable at its regular (400) and medium (500) weights for all UI text.
Do make state changes feel immediate with 150ms transitions.
Do maintain a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text against its immediate background, per WCAG AA.
Do support keyboard navigation for all controls.
donts: Don't use box-shadow on any UI element.
Don't apply saturated colors to UI chrome.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right greater than 1px) as colored accents.
Don't create identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated.
Don't use display fonts or serifs in any UI label, button, or data display.
Don't add decorative motion: no orchestrated page loads, no bounce/elastic easing.
Don't use modals for tasks that can be inline.
Don't use hero-metric templates (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds).
Don't apply glassmorphism (blur + transparency) as default decoration.
